_comment: freebsd/webapp/sftpgo.json -- install to /var/azuracast/sftpgo/sftpgo.json (directory=/var/azuracast/sftpgo in the [program:sftpgo] supervisord stanza, so relative host_keys paths below resolve from there). Adapted from util/docker/web/sftpgo/sftpgo.json -- content is unchanged from the Docker version except this comment; none of its paths were Debian-specific.

sftpd._comment_bindings: address: "" is SFTPGo's documented value for 'listen on all available interfaces' (see SFTPGo's binding docs) -- on a dual-stack host this binds both IPv4 and IPv6 wildcard sockets, same as Go's net.Listen behavior generally. Confirmed by reading SFTPGo's own binding documentation rather than assumed; left unchanged since it already covers both address families.

httpd._comment: port 0 disables SFTPGo's built-in web UI entirely, so templates_path/static_files_path below are never read. Left in place for fidelity with the Docker config; freebsd/webapp/11-sftpgo.sh does not install anything at /usr/share/sftpgo since a plain `go install` doesn't produce those assets and nothing here needs them.
